steps.note: +jobs shows all open jobs visible to the calling staff member. +job/bucket <BUCKET> filters to a single bucket.

steps.cmd: +request Help Me=I need assistance with character creation.
steps.label: player submits a job first

steps.note: +job <#> shows the full staff view including all comments (public and staff-only) and the current handler.

steps.expect: Job Title:  Help Me                Requester:  Alice
I need assistance with character creation.

steps.note: +job/claim <#> sets you as the handler. +job/assign <#>=<name> assigns to another staff member — target must have admin/wizard/superuser flag.

steps.label: assign to Alice — denied, Alice has no staff flag in mock store

steps.expect: >JOBS: Alice is not a staff member.

steps.note: +job/comment adds a public comment visible to the submitter. +job/staffnote adds a staff-only note hidden from the player.

steps.cmd: +job/comment 1=Looking into this now. I can reproduce on the test server.
steps.label: add a public comment

steps.cmd: +job/staffnote 1=Alice has reported portal issues twice before. Likely the zone-boundary bug.
steps.label: add a staff-only note (hidden from player)
view job with comments and staff note

steps.expect: Looking into this now. I can reproduce on the test server.
Alice has reported portal issues twice before. Likely the zone-boundary

steps.note: Valid levels: low, normal, high, critical. Setting priority fires the job:priority-changed hook.
+job/close <#>[=<comment>] archives the job with status 'closed' and mails the submitter.

steps.cmd: +job/close 1=Fixed in latest patch. The exit link has been corrected.
steps.label: close and archive job #1
confirm job list is now empty
